chunks.text: What is fake news?

chunks.text: Puls are misleading information that is reported as news is called fake news.

chunks.text: A common goal of fake news is to harm someone or something reputation or to profit through
chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning

chunks.text: advertising.
chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning

chunks.text: The term fake news was first used in 1890s, a time when dramatic newspaper reports were
chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning

chunks.text: common.
chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning

chunks.text: Even though incorrect information has always been dissamented throughout history.
chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning

chunks.topic: Fake News Detection Using Machine Learning
